name: Turtuk Village
description: A breathtaking, culturally rich Balti village located right near the Line of Control (LoC). It offers lush apricot orchards and a unique window into Balti culture.
history: Opened to tourists in 2010. It was under Pakistani control until the 1971 war when India reclaimed it.
famousFor: Balti culture, apricot orchards, K2 mountain views.
